headline: Kharif Crop Damage: Cyclone Montha's Devastating Impact
tldr: Cyclone Montha has severely damaged Kharif crops just days before harvest, leaving farmers feeling helpless.
key_points: Hard work lost in a single night
why_it_matters: Impact on agricultural sector and food security
for_you: Check with your local agricultural extension office for support and resources.
contrarian_view: Some argue that Cyclone Montha's impact is a wake-up call to adopt more resilient crop varieties and farming practices.

video_script.hook: Cyclone Montha has left a trail of devastation across the agricultural sector.
body: The Kharif harvest was just days away when the storm hit.
Farmers are now facing an uncertain future
video_script.closing: Stay tuned for further updates on this developing story.
